AI-Native Brand Protection

CreatorTrust AI

Instantly score influencer risk profiles before you partner. Our AI classifies, monitors, and recommends the right creators so your brand stays protected.

The Problem

Brands collaborating with micro-influencers face a hidden risk: one bad match can damage reputation built over years. Manual checks are slow, inconsistent, and miss critical signals. Marketing teams need to scale safely — without adding headcount.

How It Works

01

Submit Influencer Profile

Enter a creator's social handle or profile data. Our system ingests public signals and metadata.

02

AI Risk Analysis

CreatorTrust AI classifies risk level, extracts content patterns, and monitors historical signals — automatically.

03

Brand-Aligned Recommendation

Get a clear risk score and match recommendation tailored to your brand's values and audience.

Built for Brand Teams

Risk Classification

AI classifies influencers into Low / Medium / High risk buckets with explanations.

Pattern Extraction

Extracts recurring content themes, posting habits, and audience signals.

Continuous Monitoring

Track influencer profiles over time and alert on reputation-risk events.

Brand Matching

Recommends creators whose audience, values, and tone align with your brand.

Human in the Loop

Final partnership decisions stay with your team — AI informs, not replaces.

Fast Integration

Connects via standard social APIs — no complex setup required.

Ready to partner smarter?

CreatorTrust AI is built for European fashion and beauty brands who work with micro-influencers. Get early access and protect your brand from day one.
